## BSD Resources Repository

* [Cloud Providers](#cloud-providers)

## Cloud Providers

* **AWS Lightsail**: Supports FreeBSD 15.0, 14.3, and 13.5 (Verified: 31 March 2026)
* **Hawk Host**: Supports FreeBSD 14 and 13 (Verified: 31 March 2026)
* **Server Space**: Supports FreeBSD 14 (Verified: 31 March 2026)
* **Vultr**: Supports FreeBSD 15, 14, and 13, as well as OpenBSD 7.8 and 7.7 (Verified: 31 March 2026)

## Sites

* [vermaden](https://vermaden.wordpress.com)

## Operating Systems

* **DragonFly BSD**: [www.dragonflybsd.org]
	+ Runs smoothly on VirtualBox, beginner-friendly
* **FreeBSD**: [www.freebsd.org]
	+ Runs smoothly on VirtualBox, beginner-friendly
	+ Notes: Supports various versions and is widely used
* **GhostBSD**: [www.ghostbsd.org]
* **helloSystem**: [https://github.com/helloSystem/hello](https://github.com/helloSystem/hello)
* **MidnightBSD**: [www.midnightbsd.org]
* **NetBSD**: [www.netbsd.org]
	+ Runs smoothly on VirtualBox, beginner-friendly
* **NomadBSD**: [nomadbsd.org](http://nomadbsd.org)
* **OpenBSD**: [www.openbsd.org]
	+ Tends to run slowly on VirtualBox; however, remains beginner-friendly
